phrases.en: Everyone sat down at the table.
phrases.zh: 大家都在餐桌旁坐了下来。

phrases.en: They put their napkins on their laps.
phrases.zh: 他们把餐巾放在膝盖上。

phrases.en: Paul helped himself to some salad.
phrases.zh: 保罗给自己盛了一些沙拉。

phrases.en: And passed the serving dish to Kate.
phrases.zh: 并把上菜的盘子递给了凯特。

phrases.en: Then, they helped themselves to the food.
phrases.zh: 然后，他们各自取用食物。

phrases.en: Paul had a second helping of spaghetti.
phrases.zh: 保罗又添了一份意大利面。

phrases.en: After the main course, they had some dessert.
phrases.zh: 主菜之后，他们吃了一些甜点。
